auth.confirmation: Check your inbox to confirm your account.
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.magicConfirmation: Check your inbox for the magic link.
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.resetConfirmation: Check your inbox for the reset link.
auth.subtitle: Sign in to submit statements and access your cases across devices.
auth.title: Your secure accident file

items: leaving a parking place / opening a door
emerging from a car park, private ground or a track
entering a car park, private ground or a track
striking the rear of the other vehicle while going in the same direction and in the same lane
going in the same direction but in a different lane
encroaching on a lane reserved for traffic in the opposite direction
coming from the right (at a junction)
failing to observe a right of way sign or a red light

fields.damagePlaceholder: Describe the location and type of damage…
fields.emergency: If anyone is injured: secure the scene and call emergency number 112.
fields.initialImpact: Indicate the point of initial impact with an arrow.
fields.otherDamage: Damage to vehicles other than A and B or to objects?
fields.photoHint: Overview, damage, number plates and marks

guest.detail: You can start immediately. An account is required before the statement can be submitted.
guest.notice: You are recording this accident as a guest.
guest.sessionError: The anonymous session could not be started. Your local draft remains available.

home.intro: Record an accident step by step — calmly, completely and right at the scene.
home.joinDescription: You will receive the eight-character code from the other party.
home.joinHint: Connect using a code or QR scan
home.newHint: Create a statement step by step
home.title: What would you like to do?

incident.conflict: This case was updated elsewhere. Reload it before continuing.
incident.createError: The accident file could not be created. Please try again.
incident.saveError: This step could not be saved. Please try again.
incident.secureStorage: Saved securely in your accident file

join.consent: I consent to sharing my details with party A for this accident statement.
join.consentRequired: Please consent to the data exchange.
join.description: You can complete your part of the statement in your own language. The numbered fields 1–15 remain identical for both parties.
join.differentLanguage: The language selected here does not change the language used by party A.

errors.already_participant: You are already party A in this case.
errors.already_signed: This case has already been completed.
errors.lookup_failed: The case could not be loaded.
errors.party_b_exists: Party B has already joined this case.
errors.unauthorized: The secure session could not be created.

join.invalid: Please enter a valid eight-character code.
join.notFound: This accident code is invalid or the case is no longer available.
join.privacyNote: Personal data is shared between the accident parties only after you join.
join.success: You joined the accident as party B.
join.title: Join accident {{code}}
join.unavailable: Connecting parties will be available once the backend is enabled.

onboarding.error: The profile could not be saved.
onboarding.subtitle: These details will be inserted automatically whenever you start a new accident statement.
onboarding.title: Complete your driver profile

signatureGate.required: Both parties must first complete all required driver, vehicle, insurance, and damage fields.
signatureGate.syncing: Signing becomes available once your local changes are synchronized with the server.
signatureGate.title: Signature still locked
signatureGate.waiting: Signing becomes available once party B has joined and completed the required fields.

sketch.tip: Mark roads, directions of travel, vehicles A and B and the point of impact.

summary.disclaimer: By signing, you confirm that your details are correct. The signature does not constitute an admission of liability.
summary.qrAlt: QR code to join as party B
summary.scanHint: Enter the code or scan the QR code to securely join the accident statement.
summary.waitingForParty: Party B has not joined yet. Share the code or QR code above.

sync.conflictDescription: The field “{{field}}” was changed on another device at the same time. Which version do you want to keep?

validation.damageRequired: Please describe the visible damage or enter “No visible damage”.
validation.locationRequired: Please enter the place of accident.
validation.requiredFields: Please complete all required driver, vehicle, and insurance fields.
validation.signatureRequired: Please sign the statement before completing it.

descriptions: Enter the basic information about the accident.
These details are required for the joint statement.
Select every circumstance that applies to your vehicle.
Photograph damage and relevant details at the scene.
Draw the roads, vehicles and directions of travel.
Check your details before completing the statement.
wizard.saved: The accident statement has been saved.
titles: When and where did it happen?
Details about you and your vehicle

submission.title: Submit report
submission.description: Download the PDF or send it directly to your insurer.
submission.invalidEmail: Enter a valid insurer email address.
submission.success: The accident report was sent to the insurer.

errors.pdf_generation_failed: The PDF could not be generated yet. Make sure both parties are synced and have signed.
errors.incident_not_completed: Both parties must sign before generating the PDF.
errors.email_provider_not_configured: Email delivery has not been configured yet.
errors.submission_failed: The report could not be sent.
